---
title: "Grain Size Codes"
subtitle: "Matrix and parameter codes used for grain size analysis"
---

{{< include _db-setup.qmd >}}

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/2.0.8/css/dataTables.dataTables.min.css"/>

<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/2.0.8/js/dataTables.min.js"></script>

<style>
th { white-space: nowrap; }
.dt-length select { margin-right: 4px; }
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

matrix_data = db.query(`
  SELECT code        AS Matrix,
         description AS Description
  FROM code_lookup
  WHERE code_type = 'MATRX'
  ORDER BY CAST(replace(replace(code, 'SED', ''), 'tot', 10000) AS INTEGER)
`)

param_data = db.query(`
  SELECT code        AS Parameter,
         description AS Description
  FROM code_lookup
  WHERE code_type = 'PARAM'
    AND lower(description) LIKE '%grain%'
  ORDER BY description
`)
```

The `Matrix` and `Parameter` codes below are used to identify grain size data in the dataset.

## Matrix Codes

Sediment matrix codes relevant to grain size analysis, ordered by sediment fraction size.

```{ojs}
{
  const jq    = window.jQuery
  const cols  = ["Matrix", "Description"]

  const wrapper = html`<div style="width:100%"></div>`
  yield wrapper

  const table = html`
    <table class="display" style="width:100%">
      <thead><tr>${cols.map(c => html`<th>${c}</th>`)}</tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${matrix_data.map(r => html`
          <tr>${cols.map(c => html`<td>${r[c] ?? ""}</td>`)}</tr>
        `)}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  `

  wrapper.appendChild(table)

  jq(table).DataTable({
    paging:  false,
    dom:     'rt',
    order:   []
  })

  invalidation.then(() => {
    if (jq.fn.DataTable.isDataTable(table)) jq(table).DataTable().destroy()
  })
}
```

## Parameter Codes

Parameter codes whose descriptions contain the word "grain".

```{ojs}
{
  const jq    = window.jQuery
  const cols  = ["Parameter", "Description"]

  const wrapper = html`<div style="width:100%"></div>`
  yield wrapper

  const table = html`
    <table class="display" style="width:100%">
      <thead><tr>${cols.map(c => html`<th>${c}</th>`)}</tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${param_data.map(r => html`
          <tr>${cols.map(c => html`<td>${r[c] ?? ""}</td>`)}</tr>
        `)}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  `

  wrapper.appendChild(table)

  jq(table).DataTable({
    pageLength:  25,
    lengthMenu:  [10, 25, 50],
    dom:         'lrtip',
    order:       []
  })

  invalidation.then(() => {
    if (jq.fn.DataTable.isDataTable(table)) jq(table).DataTable().destroy()
  })
}
```
